highlights.summary: A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer:
A:    R.V.S. College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.MCACandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.MBA/PG

faqs.question: How can I get into R.V.S. College of Engineering for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
R.V.S. College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irresp

reviews.review_heading: Review of Priyadarshini College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available for course students. The infrastructure of the college is superb. Wi-Fi, library, and everything else are available for students. The quality of food in my college is very good, and the food is tasty. Medical and sports facilities are also available in my college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Priyadarshini College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college is spread over 40 acres of land. Our college has a huge ground to play games. Our college has many blocks, and each block contains 4 floors. Our library is full of books. The hostel is very good and affordable.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure were good in our department. The laboratories were available in this college. The classrooms were also well maintained, and the library was available with several books. The hostel facility was good with hot water, and the quality of food served in the hostel was good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its placements for the 2022 batch.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is good. Our college provides Wi-Fi for laboratories. It provides a big library facility in our college. The food available in our college is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college was good at infrastructure, hostel and van facilities are there.
reviews.review_text: The good facilities and infrastructure are available for our department. Labs are good and good equipment is also available. In Library so many books are available. The hostel is good and the food was tasty. A canteen is available and medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: A college with good faculty and a good environment.
reviews.review_text: Our college library is good and the labs and classrooms are also very clean and peaceful. In every lab, devices are in good condition. Hostels are too good. In the hostel, there is a separation between the boys' hostel and the girl's hostel. Food quality is good in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied. This is a good college; 50% of classmates got jobs in MNC companies.
reviews.review_text: Priyadarshini College, which is occupied by 30 hectares of land, has so many building blocks with plenty of classrooms. The library was too good. We also bring them out by using library cards. The labs are not good. According to our standards, it is enough for us. Hostels are there on college campuses only with separate hostels for boys and girls. The food was good. The medical facilities were also good. Sports and games are conducted on any occasion and weekly when we are having a sports period...

reviews.review_heading: The career responsible for joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities offered by the college in the infrastructure base are labs with Wi-Fi facility. Also offers library with good books available from all courses and all departments. The food quality is average and the hostel and mess are worth of money in the college.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with its faculty members, placements, and the rules of this college.
reviews.review_text: There are facilities like laboratories, library, and mess. The computers in the laboratory do not work properly and there will be no Wi-Fi facility for the students. The phones are not allowed. The canteen is average as sometimes there will be nothing available. The food served is average in this college. The sports and games are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college. You can join here, and it is a free campus and has a lovely environment.
reviews.review_text: There are good labs for the computer science, electronics and electrical, civil and mechanical departments. Classrooms are available for every department. Our college has a canteen. You can play good indoor games like carrom, table tennis, etc. You can also play sports like cricket, volleyball, badminton, etc., because there are two huge grounds here.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Galaxy Global Group of Institutions offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and B.Des. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Galaxy Global Group of Institutions offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fees for Galaxy Global Group of Institutions courses range between INR 97,410 to 2,59,520.

faqs.answer:
A:    Galaxy Global Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in Engineering from a recognised board with minimum 50%.MBA/PGDMCandidates must have passed graduation in any stream with the mentioned marks in aggregate from a recognised Institute/ University.MCAIn addition to the graduation, candidates should have Mathematics as compulsory subject up to 12th.BBACandidates should have passed 10+2 in any stream with the mentioned marks and mentioned subject from a recognised board.
OR
Candidates having compartment in one subject is also eligible.BCACandidates should have passed 10+2 in any stream with the mentioned marks and mentioned subject from a recognised board.
OR

(CS/IT) are also eligible to apply.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely not satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: No placements are done by the college for our course, but yes, in other courses there are good numbers of placements. For example, B.Tech. CSE has a good number of placements here, and the average package for this course's students is INR 30k per month, which is pretty decent pay.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure here is great, and classrooms are well maintained. Hostel facilities are not good, but the canteen is average. Wi-Fi is working here, and there is also a well-maintained library where you can read the books. Medical facilities are also good enough here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Best value for money college.

review_content.Placements: Our college's placement rates are very good. Up to 90 percent of placements are offered here by top companies or institutions like Paytm, Accenture, HCL, Mahindra, etc. The highest package offered here till date is INR 5LPA, which I guess is fair enough for a private university with such low fees and great faculty and opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The courses here are very good. They have well-maintained labs and instruments, and along with that, the hostels are also nice. The food offered here is very homely, tastes good, and is hygienic too. There are many other facilities also offered by our college, like open playgrounds, common rooms for studying, and a library.

overview_faqs.question: Is Galaxy Global Group of Institutions a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Galaxy Global Group of Institutions is a reputed institute for B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA, BBA, BCA, B.Des, M.E./M.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Design. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Galaxy Global Group of Institutions has a review rating of 4.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.8 on campuslife, 3.4 on placements, 4.4 on faculty and 4.7 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Galaxy Global Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college .

content.Placements: The placement department provides a strong foundation through pre-placement visits and also provides industrial visits. The highest package is about INR 30 thousand per month, the lowest package is INR 20 thousand per month, and the average package is INR 25 thousand per month.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is great, and classrooms are well maintained. Hostel facilities are not good, but the canteen is average. Wi-Fi is working here, and there is also a well-maintained library where you can read the books. Medical facilities are not good enough here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the college.

content.Placements: B.Tech CSE has less number of placements. In Other courses there is no placement. Average package of the students is 25k per month. Below 50% of students got internship from our course. And I don't know the companies in which they got internship.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure here is great and classrooms are well maintained. Hostel facilities are not good but the canteen is average. Wi-Fi is working here and there is well maintained library. Medical facilities are not good here. Sports and games are below average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely not satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: No placements are done by the college for our course, but yes, in other courses there are good numbers of placements. For example, B.Tech. CSE has a good number of placements here, and the average package for this course's students is INR 30k per month, which is pretty decent pay.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure here is great, and classrooms are well maintained. Hostel facilities are not good, but the canteen is average. Wi-Fi is working here, and there is also a well-maintained library where you can read the books. Medical facilities are also good enough here.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best value for money college.

content.Placements: Our college's placement rates are very good. Up to 90 percent of placements are offered here by top companies or institutions like Paytm, Accenture, HCL, Mahindra, etc. The highest package offered here till date is INR 5LPA, which I guess is fair enough for a private university with such low fees and great faculty and opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The courses here are very good. They have well-maintained labs and instruments, and along with that, the hostels are also nice. The food offered here is very homely, tastes good, and is hygienic too. There are many other facilities also offered by our college, like open playgrounds, common rooms for studying, and a library.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied due to good placements and good faculty.

content.Placements: Placement department provides a strong foundation through pre-placement talks, workshops and they also provide industrial visits. Companies like Wipro, Accenture, Call India ltd., HDFC Bank ltd., ICICI Bank ltd., Multisoft System, Big Bang and many more visit here. The highest package is 4.9 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is too good. The college is in a good area in an open environment. There are many labs in the college from where we can learn much better than we learn in theory. Classrooms and library are well maintained. In hostel, good quality of food is available in the mess.

The courses here are very good. They have well-maintained labs and instruments, and along with that, the hostels are also nice. The food offered here is very homely, tastes good, and is hygienic too.
There are many other facilities also offered by our college, like open playgrounds, common rooms for studying, and a library.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied due to good placements and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is too good. The college is in a good area in an open environment. There are many labs in the college from where we can learn much better than we learn in theory. Classrooms and library are well maintained. In hostel, good quality of food is available in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: It has the best surroundings, 2nd college in Haryana, and FAD is available for the fashion designer.
reviews.review_text: It provides an air-conditioned classroom, a proper study environment, fully efficient laboratories, a Wi-Fi facility available 24X7, a library hall, auditorium hall, seminar hall, air-conditioned rooms in the hostel, proper study table provided at the room, gym, sports facility provided and also television were available.

reviews.review_heading: The college has really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The campus has free Wi-Fi. A cafeteria, library and a very clean hostel are available. The mess food is very healthy. A huge playground is available on campus. A green park and lifts are available. Showers are available in the hostel washrooms. Bus facilities are available. An ATM is available.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, best faculty. Totally recommended.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the institute and the hostel is very well planned. The infrastructure is very well-equipped with all the best among the best facilities. The overall campus is good in every way. The campus is green and has a soothing atmosphere which makes studying much better.

reviews.review_heading: It has been a great experience studying at this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has provided great infrastructure and facilities for students. They provide all the basic requirements which are required in the college. Quality services are provided in terms of sports, and they take care of the canteen every day.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Galaxy Global Group of Institutions (GGGI, Ambala).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, and it seems like the top education centre. Libraries are good, and they provide almost all the required books for students. The sports complex is the best part, and it is excellent and well-maintained. Wi-Fi and air-conditioned facility is also available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: GGGI is a great way to enhance your knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of GGGI is so attractive and well-maintained. The campus is located in a very natural and peaceful environment which proves to be the best for learning. It has very good labs with high tech instruments. The campus has a well-furnished library and smart classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers in our college are helpful.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good facilities for food in mess and canteen. Other facilities, like medical facilities, are also good. Our college provides sports and games facilities. Every year, sports day is organised for games and sports which develop the sports skills of the students.

reviews.review_heading: GGGI is one of the best institutes for fashion and apparel design in Haryana.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, and there is a huge and environment-friendly campus. There are more than enough labs for us to learn in an advanced way which we learnt in theory. Our college provides the best guiding books and study materials in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied with the infrastructure, and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent. All the facilities are available including Labs, well maintained classrooms and a library. Hostel is hygienic and good quality of food is available in mess as well as canteen. Sports facilities and immediate medical attention is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Practical as well as theoretical knowledge provided by the teachers was excellent.
reviews.review_text: The Institute was rich in Infrastructure and amenities. It offered various required amenities to the students. The quality of food available in canteen and mess was so good and hygienic. Medical facilities were also very good. Sports activities were also organised frequently.

The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and B.Arch. Whereas, at PG level, Anand Institute of Higher Technology offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Anand Institute of Higher Technology fee structure for all the courses is around INR 35,000 to 4,12,000.

review_summary.college_name: Anand Institute of Higher Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied, as well as not because there is less support for clubs and activities.

content.Placements: 80% to 90% of students got placed. The highest package is 9.43 LPA, the lowest is 2.50 LPA, and the average is 4.50 LPA. Recruiting companies are Biocon, Oral-B, Lifecell, Jasmine Technologies, and Kaar Technologies. Around 80% of students got opportunities for internships at the company Oral-B and Lifecell. Roles offered are clinical research associate, quality control assistant, and bioinformatic analyst.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are not bad at our college, they have enough facilities for students. There is good infrastructure. The department is good and is so well-maintained. The library is well-maintained, and we can get ready access. We can also bring laptops and use their e-books. Hostels facilities are okay. The food is below average. Sometimes the hostlers can't eat the food provided in the college in the mess, and the food is below average, but the medical facilities are good. We have resting room in our college campus and gives importance to sports students, take them to inter-college events.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My college has good infrastructure and has been awarded for excellence in teaching.

content.Placements: Anand Institute of Higher Technology has a training and placement cell to guide students in career opportunities. They conduct training programs and employment-bridging courses. For placement, it conducts on-campus recruitment processes. The institute has an unmatched placement record. The average package offered to the students is 2.5 LPA. In 2024, 48 companies participated in AIHT Campus Placement, and 481 students were placed. The placement session for 2023–2024 is still running, with 167 offers already received by the students.
content.Infrastructure: My college has good infrastructure and has good hostel facilities. The food in the mess is average. Toilets are clean and hygienic. All classrooms are clean and good, and libraries have many collections of books. 4 students per room in the hostel, and floors will be allotted based on the year to which student belongs.

content.Infrastructure: The facilities are good, but the infrastructure of the college is quite impressive. All facilities are well-maintained. The college contains all the required labs with Wi-Fi connections, and classrooms are neat. The library has all sorts of books. Food is available in the canteen, and for hostel students, there is a separate mess with hygienic food.

hostel_campus.college_name: Anand Institute of Higher Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Anand Institute of Higher Technology have two hostels for both boys and girls which can accommodate 450 students each. A well equipped Gym is established for both the hostel students. Hostels also have the facilities for indoor games.

library.description: Anand Institute of Higher Technology has a central library, which has the collection of more than 40,539 volumes in various engineering subjects, management, basic sciences and general. The library also the subscription of more than 198 periodicals in print and 1028 bound volumes of periodicals. The services provided by the library includes Lending service, Reference service, Inter Library Loan, Internet Browsing, Current Awareness Service(CAS), and Selective Dissemination of Information (SDI) Service. Library also has a Digital Knowledge Centre in order to enable the users to browse the e-journals, e-learning materials, digital library collections of this campus and other online journals. The library services have been automated with the software named "MODERNLIB".

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Tennis Court, Table Tennis, Track Field, Throw Ball, Kabbadi

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied, as well as not because there is less support for clubs and activities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are not bad at our college, they have enough facilities for students. There is good infrastructure. The department is good and is so well-maintained. The library is well-maintained, and we can get ready access. We can also bring laptops and use their e-books. Hostels facilities are okay. The food is below average. Sometimes the hostlers can't eat the food provided in the college in the mess, and the food is below average, but the medical facilities are good. We have resting room i...

reviews.review_heading: My college has good infrastructure and has been awarded for excellence in teaching.
reviews.review_text: My college has good infrastructure and has good hostel facilities. The food in the mess is average. Toilets are clean and hygienic. All classrooms are clean and good, and libraries have many collections of books. 4 students per room in the hostel, and floors will be allotted based on the year to which student belongs.

reviews.review_heading: A perfect college for education.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good, but the infrastructure of the college is quite impressive. All facilities are well-maintained. The college contains all the required labs with Wi-Fi connections, and classrooms are neat. The library has all sorts of books. Food is available in the canteen, and for hostel students, there is a separate mess with hygienic food.

reviews.review_heading: AIHT is the best college for ECE.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. They are always available to help us. The maintenance is average. Many workers clean the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: We are free to use the labs and library whenever we want. There are free Wi-Fi facilities for students. The library has books and projects that have been made by seniors and familiar personalities. The food is average. The hostel is average.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with Education standard.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is big and spacious. Wi-Fi, labs, and library (Both department-wise and central) are available. The classrooms are spacious. Mess and canteen food are horrible. Not at all good. The playground is available. But sports are not given importance. The hostel facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Anand Institute of Higher Technology.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. The infrastructure is good. The food is of low quality. The mess is not clean. Medical facilities are good. Sports facilities are not good.

reviews.review_heading: Quality of Education is good.Satisfied because of faculty.Good placement in 2021,moderate facility
reviews.review_text: Classrooms will be spacious, Labs and libraries are good enough. Medical room is available in case of emergency. Playground is there but you will never get a chance to play there because zero priority is given to sports. Facilities in hostel and food in the mess and canteen is below average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good with the staff.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was poor in every department. There is no Wi-Fi facility. Labs were old. Library was very poor with very old books. Quality of the facilities in our hostel is better. Food in the mess is tasteless. No sports events are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has average infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is below average. Food quality is poor in canteen and mess. No sports events are conducted. Labs are quite old and not up to date. Wi-Fi is not available. Classrooms are average. Medical facilities are available and good.

reviews.review_heading: Coaching is good. Sports is poor.
reviews.review_text:
ECE Department have a separate block, they have more than 3 labs in that block but classrooms do not have an AC. Wi-Fi labs are also available. System labs have AC, ECE department have separate library.
Hostel having a lot of fun, quality of the food available in mess are not bad its average, canteen is okay, sports are below average.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of placement and good teaching skills.
reviews.review_text: The AIHT has proficient professors in all department and 90% results will be obtained on each semester. Every classroom is designed in way that every student will like. The lab facility is just awesome with high-speed Internet connection and free Wi-Fi in central library. Quality food will be provided for 2 times a day including breakfast and lunch ,3 times a day for hostelers. AIHT is excellent in sports particularly in cricket, volleyball, basketball, football, kabaddi, table tennis and also i...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Anand Institute of Higher Technology.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, seminar halls, library and auditorium are available in our course. They are good overall, but some changes are needed in infrastructure and its facilities. The hostel is maintained well by some responsible wardens. The food served is average. Medical facilities are available all the time, and sports facilities are also getting developed.

reviews.review_heading: AIHT provides a good education.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was provided to students. The library of our college was small, and hence we cant go for more. But there was enough space in labs. We also had centralised labs. Food is an important thing which hasn't met our expectations. But I heard that it seems good nowadays. Medical facilities were available 24x7. Hence need not be worried about it. If we come to sports, if the participants have the ability he can reach out to the stadium as there were well-playing educators. A gym was also provided w...

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good food and very good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our department has a lot of computers and staff members so that we can learn easily. I am a hosteller, and they provide one room for 4 students. They provide very hygienic food in our mess. Sports and games are very good in our college.

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Holy Cross College ranks #41 under the category 'College'.

The TANCET 2026 application form will be live from Mar 16, 2026, to Apr 10, 2026, for Holy Cross College admission to the MBA course. Also, the TANCET exam 2026 is scheduled for May 9, 2026.

placements.overview:
Holy Cross College is a private institute, established in 1923 in Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu. Holy Cross College is approved by AICTE and offers a total of 55 courses at UG, PG and Certificate levels in 10 specialisations such as Bioinformatics, Biotechnology, Botany, Chemistry and Computer Science. Furthermore, it offer courses such as MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., M.Sc., MCA and BCA in Full Time mode. Holy Cross College has an annual seat intake of 270 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Mass Communication & Media and Humanities & Social Sciences. As per the recent Holy Cross College placement records, the average median salary at the Institute is around INR 2,38,732. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Botany with Specialisation in Plant Biotechnology - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, best college for M.Sc. in botany course.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 90% of the students participated in our study. Top recruitment companies that visited our college for recruitment were Patanjali, Serum India Ltd, Bharat Biotech, etc. The highest salary was 12 LPA, and the lowest salary was 2 LPA. College offered an internship based on your CGPA. Overall, it was good. Top jobs were ecologist, horticulturist, and so on.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was excellent with fast speed. Labs were good with a wide range of equipment, and instructors were also good. Classrooms were large and plentiful. There was a proper library. Food was good, and we had a separate medical center with visiting doctors from Apollo. We had sports including badminton, squash, table tennis, soccer, swimming pool, and many more. Our college had a positive campus life and culture for overall student achievements.

reviews_list.batch_info: Masters of Social Work - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it is the best college for Master's of Social Work course.

review_content.Placements: About 87% of students get placed. The maximum package offered is 25 LPA, and the average package is 12 LPA. It has a tie-up with more than 100 companies. It invites more than 60 companies every year. All students, according to their skills and abilities, get opportunities for internships. The top recruiting companies for our course are HelpAge India, ITC, CVS Health, etc. High-level roles like social worker, case manager, etc., are offered here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college amenities include accommodation for students. Classrooms are cozy and entirely climate-controlled. Classrooms feature a charging station for laptops to facilitate hands-on learning experiences. Wi-Fi access is provided across the campus. Amenities at the hostel are fantastic. Hostels atmosphere is supportive of education, and there is no aggression.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: If my college and my course are very satisfied.

review_content.Placements: 90% of students got placed from my course. The highest package is Rs. 30,000 per month, the lowest is Rs. 16,000 per month, and the average is Rs. 20,000- Rs. 25,000 per month. 90% of students got placed in the internships from my course. HR, head of the department, and assistant manager these roles can be offered in my course.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my college and my course there are various types of staff who can be associated. The Wi-Fi and the lab facilities are good and the classrooms and library infrastructure are very good. The food quality is good and neat. Medical facilities are available 24/7. The sports and games facilities are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in English Literature (Communicative English) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It has good placements and good work.

review_content.Placements: 80% of students get placed in my course. There are two packages, government-applied and self-finance. Government applications include scholarships for minorities, etc. Many popular companies recruit students from our college like Omega, V-Dart, etc. 70% of students got internships from companies. Many scholars are offering placements as professors in college itself.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a language lab for enhancing our English language speaking. There is a library with a Wi-Fi connection and a canteen for students and faculty members. It has clean restrooms. Rapha clinic is on the campus for medical emergencies which is very useful for hostel students as well as day scholars. It has 17 clubs and also sports like football, volleyball, basketball, shot put, javelin throw, athletes, etc. We get healthy food in the hostel mess and it also provides a noon-meal scheme for Day scholars.

reviews_list.batch_info: Masters of Social Work - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Overall the best college for master's of social work.

review_content.Placements: In our study, almost 76% of pupils made progress. The average salary package offered is 16 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 37 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 7 LPA. The Red Cross, Oxfam, Unicef, and others are top recruiters. Program manager and social worker are among the top positions available. Internships are obtained by about 60% of students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at our college is outstanding. Our college gives us everything we need. Classrooms have projectors. The library is amazing. Water and electricity are available. The food served in the restaurant is good and clean. They offer fitness and sports services. Bathrooms are fine. The living room is nice.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Path towards the successful life.

review_content.Placements: There are more companies like Omega, TCS, etc., are visit for campus drives. The average salary package offered ranges from 3 LPA - 6 LPA. Students who get above 75% can easily get placements in companies. College fee is affordable for all types of students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college and hostel is quite good. Library contains 130,843 books and 148 journals. They give importance to sports activities also. There are up to 5-8 students per room in the hostel. They provide healthy food and follow their routine menu.

paragraphs: Holy Cross College admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG, Advanced Masters and Certificate levels in streams includingMedicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Mass Communication and Media, Humanities and Social Sciences, Science and Teaching and Education.Holy Cross Collegeadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asTANCET, CBSE 12th, and Tamilnadu 12th. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 1 year - 3 years.

highlights.description: One of India’s top schools is Holy Cross College. Numerous national ranking agencies have continuously recognised it as one of the best institutes. According to the NIRF Ranking 2025, the institute has been awarded #52 rank in the Colleges category. The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around Holy Cross College rankings.

rankings.highlight: 4th Best Among Outlook Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2023
4th Best Among Outlook Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2024
8th Best Among Outlook Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2024
12th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2024
14th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, Holy Cross College has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Colleges' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Colleges' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. In 2025, Holy Cross College fell 11 ranks to #52 rank in the 'Colleges' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.
Read less

outlook.description:
Holy Cross College has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by Outlook-ICARE 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Science' category, the institute's ranks have displayed constancy in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Holy Cross College's rank is #23, the same as last year's rank in the 'Science' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a fluctuating trend in the 'BCA' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Holy Cross College fell 1 rank to #23 rank in the 'BCA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Commerce' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Holy Cross College's rank is #55, the same as last year's rank in the 'Commerce' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
Explore the Holy Cross College latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:

reviews.review_heading: Path towards the successful life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college and hostel is quite good. Library contains 130,843 books and 148 journals. They give importance to sports activities also. There are up to 5-8 students per room in the hostel. They provide healthy food and follow their routine menu.

reviews.review_heading: Flexible college in doing courses.
reviews.review_text: Library contains unlimited collection of books, magazines, periodicals, etc. And it was accessible by everyone. Also, we have all the digital resources which were helpful during placements. In canteen, there is a separate space allotted for cafeterias and food courts.

reviews.review_heading: Short and sweet note about my MSW course in Holy Cross College.
reviews.review_text: To support fieldwork, transportation facilities were actively arranged by the management. Also, various NGOs and NSS were supported by the college management. It’s necessary to wear a uniform during fieldwork and practicals. Classrooms were sanitized once in two days.

reviews.review_heading: Master of Social Work (MSW) at Holy Cross College.
reviews.review_text: Students are provided with individual usernames and passwords to access free internet services. For security, surveillance cameras are installed throughout the college campus. In the hostel, there is a large laundry area for eating and relaxing.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for MSW.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are fully air-conditioned and fully furnished. Free Wi-Fi access is here. The college labs are good and have all the necessary equipment. We have an excellent library that is full of various books, articles, journals, and magazines that help the students. Food items in the canteen and food court are very healthy. Sports and games are open to all. Our college also has medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best college for a Master of Social Work course.
reviews.review_text: Our college housing is not very good. The Wi-Fi connection is poor. A computer room is fine, but sometimes, most computers won't work properly. Classrooms are well-maintained and clean, so the atmosphere is good. Our office is in excellent condition. The library is good and quiet. It has a good collection of books.

reviews.review_heading: Really good faculty and facilities available at the Holy cross college.
reviews.review_text: Holy Cross College has an above-average infrastructure for the BCA course. The facilities available at the college campus for the students were good enough. The college has Wi-Fi, labs, a library, a canteen, a hostel, sports, etc. Facilities for the students. The food available in the canteen and hostel mess was good to eat. College management tries its best to provide good-quality facilities to the students.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college because it has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college facilities are much not good. The Wi-Fi connection is not good. Computers labs are good but sometimes, most of the computers will not work properly. Classrooms are well-maintained and clean so the atmosphere is good. Our department has a good atmosphere well. The library is neat and silent. It has a good collection of books.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with because of good faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: In our college, free Wi-Fi and classrooms are available. The infrastructure of our department is good. Labs are available in our college. Our college provides hostel and food facilities. The food served in our canteen and mess is tasty. Our coaches train us for sports and games every day.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the good faculty, placements, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have all the facilities and infrastructure available in our department, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, seminar halls, and a library. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good. Our college has provided us with the quality of food available in the mess and canteen. We also have medical facilities and sports and games, which are also good.

college_info.intro:
NIF Global Andheri offers UG, PG, and certificate courses across Design, Management, and others. The flagship courses offered at NIF Global Andheri are BDes and BVoc. The institute offers specialisation in Fashion Design and Interior Design. NIF Global Andheri focuses on skill enhancement that includes theoretical and practical training. The institute designs the curriculum as per the industry standards and includes a mix of general education and vocational training.
Check the popular programmes offered at NIF Global Andheri in the following table:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: NIF Global Andheri offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and certificate courses across Degin, Management programmes. At the UG level, the institute offers BVoc, BDes, and BBA programmes to the students. At the PG level, the institute offers MVoc in Fashion Design and Interior Design. Candidates can check the NIF Global Andheri courses along with the eligibility criteria and the NIF Global Andheri fees:

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for NIF Global Andheri BDes ranges between INR 18 lakh and INR 20 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates need to pay course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the institute. Besides, aspirants need to pay an application fee in the start to register for a course.
faqs.question: What is the fee for BDes at NIF Global Andheri?

faqs.answer: A:    The NIF Global Andheri has an intake capacity of about 200 students for its B.Des (Bachelor of Design) program. The B.Des programme at NIF Global Andheri is a three-year full-time degree program. The institute was established in the year 2003 and is affiliated with Medhavi Skill University and recognised by the Maharashtra State Board. The B.Des programme focuses on interior design and has a total tuition fee of INR 6.08 Lacs for the entire duration of the course
faqs.question: How many students can do B.Des at NIF Global Andheri?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes you can get admission to B.Des at NIF Global Andheri with 75 percentile in UCEED. However, you need to take Common Entrance Examination for Design (CEED) with percentile equal to or more than 75 to get admission to NIF Deccan, Pune. Additionally, states that the major admission in reputed B.Des colleges are based on UCEED (Undergraduate Common Entrance Exam), and the UCEED marks between 200-250 are good enough for getting top design colleges and some of the flagship courses of reputed colleges.
faqs.question: Can I get B.Des at NIF Global Andheri with 75 percentile in UCEED?

reviews_list.review_title: Better training, proper development of mental skills, and all other facilities are provided.

review_content.Placements: Placement rates are high every year. Many international companies come to select talented students. Selection depends upon interview, not on the marks. If a student has marks, but no brain, then he cannot be qualified by higher level companies. One has to develop both mentally and physically, which are trained in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college consists of Wi-Fi campus with AC rooms and proper labs. It also focuses on curriculum activities more, for better brain development. Hostel facilities are provided to the students and bus facilities are provided for the students who stay nearby. Smart-boards are available in every class to make studies efficient, interesting and better.

admission_overview.college_name: NIF Global Andheri Admission 2025: Fee, Eligibility & Selection Process

paragraphs: NIF Global Andherioffers many courses across the fields of Fashion Design, Interior Design, Design Management, and others. These courses are offered at UG, PG, and diploma levels. Students can also pursue vocational courses at the institute. Admissions to most of the programmes offered atNIF Andheriare done based on academic merit. However, for its MBA course admission, the institute accepts students on an entrance basis. Read the following article to know all about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and admission process of NIF Andheri.

Admissions toNIF Global Andheri coursesare accepted both based on merit secured by the applicants in the entrance exam and the relevant qualifying exam. For admissions to its undergraduate, postgraduate (except for MBA), diploma and certificate courses, the institute considers merit secured in the last qualifying exam. For MBA admission, NIF Global Andheri takes into consideration MAH CET marks. The table below contains details regarding the eligibility and selection criteria for the popularNIF Andheri courses:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Graduation with a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised university
Class 12 from a recognised board
Merit-based
Certificate
Class 12 with a minimum aggregate of 60% from a recognised board
Merit-based
Class 12 with a minimum aggregate of 60% from a recognised board
Merit-based
Graduation in the relevant stream from a recognised university
Merit-based

The admission procedure for the NIFGlobal Andheri admission processincludes several steps, such as application, shortlisting, and admission confirmation. Interested students must satisfy the admission criteria as specified by the institute before applying for the desired course at the institute. Aspirants can follow the steps listed below to complete theNIF Global Andheri admission process:
1: Application Process

Candidates who meet the eligibility can visit the official website to fill out the form online. The students need to select the desired course, fill in all the specified details, pay the application fee and upload the required documents to complete the registration.
2: Selection Process

The institute shortlists students based on various parameters. For its MBA course admissions, a valid score secured by the candidates in the MHT CET is considered. Furthermore, for the remaining courses, the institute accepts students on a merit basis.
3: Counselling and Fee Payment
The shortlisted candidates will have to pay the course fee and submit the required documents to confirm their seat in the college.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to NIF Global Andheri for the MBA course with 65% marks in my graduation?
faqs.answer: Based on the official website of NIF Global Andheri, students for the MBA course are selected depending on their performance on the accepted entrance exam. Graduates from an accredited university are qualified for admission. Moreover, as per the general information, most colleges and universities accept students who finish their graduation with a total score of 65%. Prospective students can also refer to the official website or contact the admissions office for further information.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for MBA at NIF Global Andheri?
faqs.answer: Candidates are selected based on an Admission Test and performance in a Personal Interview. To be eligible for the MBA in Fashion Design program, students must have completed their graduation with a minimum of 40% aggregate marks from a recognized college or university. NIF Global Andheri conducts its own separate entrance exam for admission to the MBA program. After the entrance exam, there may also be a Written Ability Test (WAT) followed by a personal interview.

overview_faqs.question: Is Gurgaon College of Engineering a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Gurgaon College of Engineering is a reputed institute for B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Gurgaon College of Engineering has a review rating of 2.7 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 2.6 on campuslife, 1.8 on placements, 2.9 on faculty and 3.9 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Gurgaon College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: A good college at verge of closing.

content.Placements: Placements are equally horrible as in all other private colleges. You will get to sit for about 5-7 companies and only a couple of them might be a job you would be interested in. Overall I must say placement is below average. Placement coordinator is a demotivating character. Only a few faculty members will guide you honestly and genuinely.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite attractive. Overall there are 3 blocks, classes are held in block A and B and Block has labs for mechanical and civil. Gardens are good, the ground is good, hostels are well-equipped. Greenery is commendable parking facility available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure, average faculty members and placements.

content.Placements: Placements in our college were subjective. It depends on your talent. But, the number of companies that visited were less because of the dooming engineering phase. Roles were offered in automobile, electronics, electrical, voice, non-voice and testing domains. Some of the students were placed, and some students were not. So, the placements were not 100%.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was pretty good. Buildings had all the required amenities. The facade was made of glass. The campus has an ATM, mess, canteen and a well-equipped ritzy computer lab. All the classrooms and offices are equipped with A/C. There were sports facilities and huge lawns. So overall, the infrastructure of the college was good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: Placements were good if you had the competency. Infrastructure was good and pedagogy could improve.

content.Placements: Placements offered by the college were mainly for technical roles. Companies like Aon Hewitt, Clearpath Technology, and Magneti Marelli visited the campus and recruited students. Placement packages ranged between Rs. 20,000-60,000 per month depending upon the profile and the company. Placements were not 100% as there was a competition among students and not many companies visited.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was fairly good. It had nice AC classrooms, well-equipped computer labs, canteen, and auditoriums. The campus had an ATM too. The library was huge and had many books for students. Quality of food served in the canteen was good, but there was scope to introduce variety in the menu. Also, hostel rooms were nice and equipped with AC.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the college but there are no placements after the completion of the graduation.

content.Placements: At the time of admission they will tell you the big company name for placement, but in reality, a single industry is not coming for placements. They are not arranging any interviews if you got any marks it doesn't matter they don't provide you with any placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. It is providing you with the best classrooms, medical facility and Wi-Fi. The labs are available, but there is no use of labs. The canteen is average. We can say that the infrastructure is average. There is no facility of games, and if you are in this college, they will give you burden.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the college.

content.Placements: Two companies visit the campus to recruit students from CSE or ECE. No placements for mechanical and civil students. Fees are also too much high as compared to the service provided. In my 4th year, I didn't see any company visiting the campus for placements of mechanical and civil engineering students.
content.Infrastructure: Have everything but not working properly. Wi-Fi is restricted, labs don't have models, either sports activities. The faculty members are not experienced, so they don't provide good knowledge about subjects and lab programs. The classrooms have the old pattern of study. The teaching staff are non-technical.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Northern Institute of Engineering Technical Campus (NIET Alwar) offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM. Northern Institute of Engineering Technical Campus (NIET Alwar) courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Northern Institute of Engineering Technical Campus (NIET Alwar) courses stands around INR 66,000 to 1,96,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Northern Institute of Engineering Technical Campus (NIET Alwar) offers Degree and Diploma courses including 5 UG and 1 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Northern Institute of Engineering Technical Campus (NIET Alwar) has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.

There is a decent library in this college. Hostel is very good. The food served in the mess is excellent. Medical facilities are available. Sports are conducted in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with overall good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our campus is good, as is the hostel infrastructure. There are very decent faculty members who teach very generously about topics and deeply explain the concepts, and the inside campus infrastructure is also good. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is good; they take care about the hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Northern Institute of Engineering Technical Campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like computer laboratories and Wi-Fi. Hostels and classrooms are average. The food served in the mess is good. Medical facilities are good. Our college has a playground for sports. The library has old books. Students cannot find course-related books in the library. Less than half of the syllabus-related books are present in the library.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college. It has good teachers and sports.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well-maintained, and there is cleanliness all around. It has Wi-Fi and computer labs. Hostel facilities are also very good. It has all the medical facilities. It has indoor as well as outdoor games like chess, carrom and table tennis. Inter sports competition is also done every year.

reviews.review_heading: Not recommended at all to good students.
reviews.review_text: There labs which are decent in size and there's workshop as well. For games there are cricket, badminton table tennis, basketball, football ground facilities swimming pool isn't there. There's just one hostel and it's for boys only where rooms are very small, max occupancy is 2 students per room you'll get air cooler, fan, curtains, B.Ed chair provided in hostel rooms bathrooms are very dirty they are rarely cleaned. Wi-Fi is there for hostel students speed is very poor, there no LAN connection....

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The college is situated in a very good location, and it is opposite the highway. There is no Wi-Fi on the campus, and the library is also not good. Hostel facilities are also not good on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of campus placements and education quality.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was excellent. College building looked pretty good. Classrooms were awesome to sit. But there was high electricity cut off. I would say that our college had the best infrastructure in Alwar. It was clean & good. I am satisfied with the campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text:
1. Well furnished classrooms with properly working AC'S. Free Wi-Fi facilities to the students of the college. 
2. The quality of the facilities of hostel is very good and the food available in the mess and canteen is too hygienic. And in sports also there is a good faculty.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is awesome, and good discipline is also maintained here.
reviews.review_text: Buildings in our college are good, but it looks like they are closely packed. The college doesn't provide any Wi-Fi facilities. Our classrooms are well-designed. We have a library, but it has old books. The quality of our labs is really awesome. No sports facilities are available for the students. The canteen available here is not that good.

reviews.review_heading: NIET College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the only best thing about this college. A cricket ground, volleyball ground, basketball court are available in the college. The library is available, where you can hardly get the famous authors book for the better content. The worse part is that it's a Wi-Fi campus, but no student or not a single faculty member has access to Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty members here are very supportive.
reviews.review_text:
There are awesome classrooms, library, canteen and hostel, cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball court and badminton court.
NIET is the only college in Alwar with a beautiful infrastructurel which is eco-friendly. My college has the most beautiful infrastructure in Alwar.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with my college about the management and placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in my college were very good like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, medical facility, sports and games. The quality of labs was very good all equipment were available in my college labs. The classrooms were well designed with proper ventilation, and the quality of food in my college canteen was not that good. The hostel rooms were very good.  I didn't face infrastructure related issues during my tenure at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the faculty and placements. The infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is quite good. All the labs are equipped with modern equipment. The classrooms are okay with CCTVs installed all over the campus. A 
dedicated basketball ground, volleyball courts, and cricket ground are there on the campus. Facilities for other games such as badminton, table tennis, etc. are also present.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied by management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is below average it is not a fully Wi-Fi connected campus, All equipment are damaged in the labs, but the classrooms are in better conditions. There are no medical facilities in the campus and no sports facilities here. An annual sports day is celebrated every year. Low-quality food will be available in the hostel mess and in the canteen. The hostel is very congested as 3 students in a single room is compulsary.

college_info.college_name: DBSOM - Don Bosco School of Management

highlights.summary:
Don Bosco School of Management (DBSOM) is a premier management institute in India and is recognised by the AICTE and AIMA. The institute has been ranked 3rd by Outlook in India MBA Rankings 2020.

The institute has also been recognised by FIBAA, Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology, Japan, and Japan Institution for Higher Education Evaluation (JIHEE).

DBSOM has signed MOUs with six internationally and globally recognised Universities to offer courses. Furthermore, the students learn different foreign languages as part of the curriculum and get opportunities to do their internship in countries outside India.

DBSOM offers PG level programmes such as PGDM, MSc, MFM, and also PGDM + Certified Expert in Development Finance in the area of Data Science and Management.

The application process is completed in online mode. Admissions to all the programmes are based on the rank in the merit list. Interested candidates can refer to below-mentioned details about DBSM admission process:

DBSM offers two years full-time PGDM and MSc programme with a specialisation in Big Data and Business Analytics in the field of the Data Science It offers five full-time programmes such as MFM, PGPM +MBA, PGDM in Finance, PGPM +MBA in hospitality, and PGDM+ Certified expert in Development Finance in the field of management. Mentioned below are the key DBSM courses along with their eligibility criteria and fee structure:

DBSOM placements are very good, on average 90 to 96% of the students get placed every year. The average salary offered to the students is Rs 7 LPA and the highest salary offered till date is Rs 24 LPA.

An internship is considered to be a significant part of the curriculum and is mandatory for all students. After completing their internships, students have to submit the report to the institute and the foreign university to which their course is affiliated to.

Some of the top recruiters who visit campus to hire students are UST Global, NEC, Xerox, Microsoft, TCS, Virtusa, VServ, and many more.

Check out details on DBSOM Placements.

DBSOM scholarships are offered to SC/ST, OBC and meritorious students as per the guidelines of Karnataka government. Students can also apply for other scholarships given by many government-aided or private organisations.

Furthermore, the school has tie-ups with many banks, which give loans to students to pursue their study with a very low rate of interest. Mentioned below are a few scholarships offered by the Karnataka government for which students can apply:

placements.overview:
DBSOM - Don Bosco School of Management is a private institute. DBSOM - Don Bosco School of Management offers a total of 5 courses at PG levels in 2 specialisations such as Business Analytics and Finance. Furthermore, it offer courses such as MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. in both Full Time and Part Time modes. DBSOM - Don Bosco School of Management fee structure includes a total tuition fee is INR 24,00,000. DBSOM - Don Bosco School of Management has an annual seat intake of 225 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

Q. How many courses are offered by DBSOM?

A. DBSOM offers a total of six courses in three streams.

highlights.summary: CMJ University admissions 2025 are open for various courses. Students can apply online by visiting the official website.

college_info.intro:
CMJ University popular programmes are BTech and BSc. BTech students are placed in top companies at top positions. BTech students can become Engineers, Software Developers, or can go for various other job profiles relevant to their field. The university follows outcome-based education (OBE) framework. The university follows a teaching-learning process.
BTech and BSc students can go for MTech and MSc programmes. Overall, it is one of the best universities offering quality education to students. Below mentioned are some of the CMJ University courses and their respective eligibility and CMJ University fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    To join CMJ University, candidates need to follow the admission procedure mentioned on the university's website. CMJ University conducts its own entrance exam for various courses, and group discussions and personal interviews are taken for admitting students in MBA and M.Phil courses. Each course has its own eligibility conditions which are stated in the prospectus. Candidates with marks more than 80% in the 10+2/Graduation can apply for admissions directly. CMJ University is recognised by the University Grants Commission, and its degree is recognised for government jobs all over India
faqs.question: Can I join CMJ University directly?

faqs.answer: A:    No, candidates do not require appearing for JEE Main for admission at CMJ University. The university offers admission to BTech course based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Mathematics and Physics as compulsory subjects are offered admission in the BTech programme.
faqs.question: Does CMJ University accepts JEE score?

faqs.answer: A:    The aspirants who are graduates from recognised universities in any stream can apply for MBA at CMJ University. Candidates must have the mark sheet and pass certificate with them. It has to be submitted at the time of form filling and admission for verification purposes. Hence, aspirants shall keep the original and copies handy with them.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria to get into MBA course of CMJ University?

faqs.answer: A:    CMJ University offers merit-based admission to its BPharm course. Hence, a cutoff list is not prepared by the university. However, a merit list can be published to declare names of the selected students. These candidates are called for counselling and document verification. The merit list is made as per the applicants performance in Class 12 or equivalent examination.

admission_overview.college_name: CMJ University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

paragraphs: CMJ University admissionsare primarily merit-based. The university conducts its own entrance exam for the various courses.CMJ Universityoffers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in multiple streams such as Engineering, Pharmacy, Science, Management, etc. Interested candidates can apply online on the official website of the university.

The university offers admission to most of the courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants meeting the eligibility criteria can fill out the application form. Below areCMJ University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
CMJ University admissionsare held twice a year. Every year, the spring sessions start in January and the fall session in July. Below are the steps to get a seat in the university:
STEP 1: CMJ University Application Process 2025
Candidates can download the application form or collect the same from the campus. Aspirants need to fill out the details in the application form and pay an application fee to register for a course.
STEP 2: Selection

CMJ University conducts an entrance exam to select candidates for professional courses. Selected aspirants have to further appear for GDPI for MBA, MPhil, BTech and MTech courses. Besides, the selection for all other programmes is based on merit in the last qualifying exam.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

Once the selection rounds are over, the university releases a merit list to announce the names of the selected candidates. Such candidates are further called for counselling and document verification. Candidates need to pay theCMJ University feeto confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to an MBA course of CMJ University must be graduates in any stream. The eligible aspirants can proceed with the application formalities. Eligible candidates can apply in both online and offline modes. Following this, the applicants have to appear for theCMJU Entrance Test. Shortlisted candidates have to further participate in the group discussion and personal interview round. After the final selection is done, candidates have to pay the admission fee amount to secure

faqs.question: Can a student get admission to CMJ University MBA without CMJU entrance?
faqs.answer: No, CMJ University may not offer admission to candidates without a valid score in CMJU Entrance Test. Thus, the aspirants must appear for the university entrance exam. Candidates who get shortlisted are called for the group discussion and personal interview round. Once the final selection is done, the candidates can pay the admission fee amount to secure their seats.

faqs.question: Is admission open in CMJ University for MBA?
faqs.answer: The admissions are ongoing at CMJ University as per the official website. MBA aspirants can contact the admission office for more details. The course aspirants shall stay updated with the admission schedule. Applications must be submitted on or before the prescribed deadline.

faqs.question: When are CMJ University application forms out?
faqs.answer: CMJ University applications are currently open. Candidates can download the application form from the university's website. The admissions are held twice in a year. The spring session commences in January and fall session in July. Aspirants have to fill out the application form in their own writing in English for the preferred course.

faqs.question: Can I join CMJ University directly?
faqs.answer: To join CMJ University, candidates need to follow the admission procedure mentioned on the university's website. CMJ University conducts its own entrance exam for various courses, and group discussions and personal interviews are taken for admitting students in MBA and M.Phil courses. Each course has its own eligibility conditions which are stated in the prospectus. Candidates with marks more than 80% in the 10+2/Graduation can apply for admissions directly. CMJ University is recognised by the University Grants Commission, and its degree is recognised for government jobs all over India

faqs.question: Does CMJ University accepts JEE score?
faqs.answer: No, candidates do not require appearing for JEE Main for admission at CMJ University. The university offers admission to BTech course based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Mathematics and Physics as compulsory subjects are offered admission in the BTech programme.

faqs.question: How can I apply for an MBA at CMJ University?
faqs.answer: CMJ University Meghalaya accept MBA applications in both online and offline modes. Candidates with a bachelor's degree are eligible to apply. To apply online, aspirants can visit the official website. While for offline application submission, the candidates can download the application and submit it to the admission office. An application fee also has to be paid for application submission.Visit the official website.Click on 'Admission' and then on 'Apply Online'.Fill all the details as asked and upload the required documents.Check the details before you click on 'Submit'.

hostel.description:
The university has fully furnished and cozy hostels having total capacity of nearly 500 students. The calm serene tranquil atmosphere of hostel guided by discipline plays a key role in student's personality development because they find time to spend with him.
In a week three days will be non-veg meal. Students are not allowed to leave the hostel without written permission of the hostel warden or recommendation
of their guardian/local guardian. Hostel fee once paid will not be refundable. Seat will available as per 1st come 1st service.

library.description: The library of CMJ University has a lavish collection of books, periodicals, reports and reference material in its shelves and racks and maintaining through an Open Access System. A separate research center subscribes to major technical journals, magazines and newspapers., Photocopy, lamination and spiral binding facilities are available for students in a different section of the library. The University act as keen supplier of knowledge in this age of global access and creates an exposure and accessibility to students through its special facilities like e-journals and online journals.

reviews.review_heading: CMJ University is the best For MCA.
reviews.review_text: The university provides facilities like the library, big classrooms, and computer labs. The College library provides many books to the students. Hostel fees is 40000 per year and mess food is not bad. Sports tournaments are conducted every year and many students participate in the events.

reviews.review_heading: My college is CMJ university.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was not too good, its level was moderate, but the hostel and library were very good, all teachers were highly qualified, and all students have also supported by all teachers during the class, I think this was very good in old college, I think it's enough.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Classrooms are spacious with a well-ventilated system and equipped with digital projectors for presentation. A huge library is available for students. The food served in the mess and canteen is good and affordable. They provide a variety of food items at affordable prices. Food delivery is also available.

reviews.review_heading: You can join our university to get better placements and have a successful future.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms were huge. They had air conditioning and projectors. There was also a huge library with high-speed internet. The canteen and mess facilities were also good. They served a variety of food items at affordable prices.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied to be a student of this college.
reviews.review_text: There are 200 beds for boys and 100 beds for girls in our college hostel. I am a day scholar, so I do not know much about the hostel. However, I know somewhat that the food served in our hostel is quite good. The restrictions are strictly followed.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good institution for computer science.
reviews.review_text: It provides a hostel facility for the students. The food served in the hostel was hygienic and healthy. All things were well-organised in our hostel. Rules and regulations were strictly followed, which was a good sign.
