reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good Environment with unforgettable Hostel Life and unreplaceable friends.

review_content.Placements: Placements in my college are 50-50 chances. It depends on student talent and hard work. We got only a few MNC companies, but we went to many drives. And job melas. The least package is 2 LPA. And heights depend on the company, and they will change every year. In my time, we got 7 LPA as a heights package for my classmates.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have good infrastructure and extensive facilities. Like unlimited Wi-Fi, so many labs for every branch, a huge library for large sittings, etc. We have good Hospitality and nice atmosphere. My College grow many trees and plants around the college. So it feels very hygienic and pleasant. And coming to hostal, it is average. Food will be okay not too bad and NAT too good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Reality of B.Teach colleges.

review_content.Placements: 10 percent of the students were placed in the college placement; the highest package was 3 LPA, and the average was 2.4 LPA. The top recruiting companies in the college are wipro, Mahindra, Infosys, etc.100 percent of the students got internship from IIDT, and the top roles offered to the students were trainee, software developer, backend developer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not so good, but there is a special dedicated computer lab for all the purposes of the students, and the students can utilise the computers, which are provided with internet. There is also no proper canteen, and the food of the message is the worst, and there are no games for the students. Given the pleasure period, students are usually not allowed to play on the playground.

overview_faqs.question: Can Lingayas Institute Of Management And Technology be considered as a reputed Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Lingayas Institute Of Management And Technology are B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Lingayas Institute Of Management And Technology has a rating of 3.6 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 3.8, 3.4, 3.7 and 3.6 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: Lingayas Institute Of Management And Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is average, there should be a little bit improvement in faculty and infrastructure.

content.Placements: At Lingayas Institute of Management and Technology approximately 60% of students from the most recent graduation years secured placements through campus recruitment. The highest package offered for a student was around 10 LPA while the lowest package stood at 1.2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: At Lingayas Institute of Management and Technology, the infrastructure provided for the course is generally satisfactory. Classrooms are spacious, but there is a lack of cleanliness. However, Wi-Fi facilities are not available for students on the campus premises.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college review is based on my experience.

content.Placements: Above 60% of our super seniors got placed and our seniors are also placed in the companies. The overall salary package offered is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Infosys and Welltech visit the college for placements. They also offer many internship options for students to shine in their careers.
content.Infrastructure: Our college hostel provides quality food and the cooks and hostel management are friendly with students. In every room, there is a Wi-Fi facility. Every hostel room is well-maintained. There is also a laundry facility to wash the clothes. It is a preferable college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good Environment with unforgettable Hostel Life and unreplaceable friends.

content.Placements: Placements in my college are 50-50 chances. It depends on student talent and hard work. We got only a few MNC companies, but we went to many drives. And job melas. The least package is 2 LPA. And heights depend on the company, and they will change every year. In my time, we got 7 LPA as a heights package for my classmates.
content.Infrastructure: We have good infrastructure and extensive facilities. Like unlimited Wi-Fi, so many labs for every branch, a huge library for large sittings, etc. We have good Hospitality and nice atmosphere. My College grow many trees and plants around the college. So it feels very hygienic and pleasant. And coming to hostal, it is average. Food will be okay not too bad and NAT too good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Reality of B.Teach colleges.

content.Placements: 10 percent of the students were placed in the college placement; the highest package was 3 LPA, and the average was 2.4 LPA. The top recruiting companies in the college are wipro, Mahindra, Infosys, etc.100 percent of the students got internship from IIDT, and the top roles offered to the students were trainee, software developer, backend developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not so good, but there is a special dedicated computer lab for all the purposes of the students, and the students can utilise the computers, which are provided with internet. There is also no proper canteen, and the food of the message is the worst, and there are no games for the students. Given the pleasure period, students are usually not allowed to play on the playground.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Campus life at Lingayas Institute of Management and Technology.

content.Placements: This college is not that good for placements. Mostly, 40–50% of the students are placed in low packages. The highest package may be 8 LPA, the average package may be 4.5–5 LPA, and the lowest package will be 2.5 LPA. Some of the companies, like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, HCL, etc., hire from the campus. Product companies are doing very little hiring. There are no placement training programs so far.
content.Infrastructure: My experience is positive overall. There are well-equipped labs that facilitate hands-on learning. Faculty have good knowledge in their domain. Three are sports clubs, including cricket and badminton tournaments, etc. The hostel facilities, though not perfect, provide essential amenities such as washing machines and laundry services.

faqs.question: How can I get into Lingayas Institute Of Management And Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Lingayas Institute Of Management And Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC
approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.MBA/PGDMCand

faqs.question: How many seats are available at Lingayas Institute Of Management And Technology for all courses combined?
faqs.answer: Lingayas Institute Of Management And Technology courses are approved by eminent Government bodies such as AICTE. The combined seats available for various programmes provided by Lingayas Institute Of Management And Technology goes up to 750.

reviews.review_heading: The college is average, there should be a little bit improvement in faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: At Lingayas Institute of Management and Technology, the infrastructure provided for the course is generally satisfactory. Classrooms are spacious, but there is a lack of cleanliness. However, Wi-Fi facilities are not available for students on the campus premises.

reviews.review_heading: Our college review is based on my experience.
reviews.review_text: Our college hostel provides quality food and the cooks and hostel management are friendly with students. In every room, there is a Wi-Fi facility. Every hostel room is well-maintained. There is also a laundry facility to wash the clothes. It is a preferable college.

reviews.review_heading: Good Environment with unforgettable Hostel Life and unreplaceable friends.
reviews.review_text: We have good infrastructure and extensive facilities. Like unlimited Wi-Fi, so many labs for every branch, a huge library for large sittings, etc. We have good Hospitality and nice atmosphere. My College grow many trees and plants around the college. So it feels very hygienic and pleasant. And coming to hostal, it is average. Food will be okay not too bad and NAT too good.

reviews.review_heading: Reality of B.Teach colleges.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not so good, but there is a special dedicated computer lab for all the purposes of the students, and the students can utilise the computers, which are provided with internet. There is also no proper canteen, and the food of the message is the worst, and there are no games for the students. Given the pleasure period, students are usually not allowed to play on the playground.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life at Lingayas Institute of Management and Technology.
reviews.review_text: My experience is positive overall. There are well-equipped labs that facilitate hands-on learning. Faculty have good knowledge in their domain. Three are sports clubs, including cricket and badminton tournaments, etc. The hostel facilities, though not perfect, provide essential amenities such as washing machines and laundry services.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty experience, average facilities and infrastructure, and good sports and cultural events.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and infrastructure are below average, the quality of food is good, but living will be somewhat of a mess, and the canteen is okay. Sports and games are 100% worth it. I prefer to go as a day scholar or live near a room. Faculty members never disappoint you.

reviews.review_heading: A college with good greenary surroundings and a vibe with whole positivity towards the students .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the department is very well developed and it can be identified easily for its name and mainly well developed labs spacious and every equipment is available, well designed classrooms for the students who are very fond of cinematic design of classrooms and there is a very big library and everything is available there, Wi-Fi is also available with a high-speed and finally hostel with a huge play area with fully greenary and the quality of the food is good .

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placements in 2022, really good .
reviews.review_text: It is really very good. Good hostel. Drinking water facility. Canteen food is really tasty, and it doesn't spoil health. Library is really nice. We are provided with lots of books, apart from academic books, we also have many novels and motivational books.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is excellent. We have two blocks, and we get a good canteen. The hostel is in a separate block and we have a good library as well as the best labs and grounds, with good faculty members to demonstrate in the labs.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has very good atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: In our college, canteen and hostel facilities were good. Laboratory was also well-equipped. Our campus was surrounded by trees, and bus facility was also available.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good in classrooms and Wi-Fi is available 24x7 on a high-speed network. Labs have good equipment and the library with a huge collection of books related to our courses. The food provided in the mess is average. The medical facility is available. Sports and games are part of college timings.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Lingayas Institute Of Management And Technology.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available 24x7. Classrooms are spacious and good. The library and digital library are available. Hostel food is good. Sports are conducted once a semester. Medical facilities are available 24x7. Hostel facilities are good, especially for girls.

reviews.review_heading: Best college and satisfied because of facilities and good pass percentage.
reviews.review_text: Best room and 24/7 Wi-Fi and with a fine gym and after college timings all sports are held medical facilities are available 24/7 with a fine support lab are well-set and highly qualified professional food was good and sports are played up to national level.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the placement record.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available 24×7. Labs are clean and tidy. Classrooms are of 2 types. digital classrooms are also available. The library is very spacious. The quality of food is good. Medical facilities are available 24×7. Sports and games are conducted every semester. The canteen is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Happy to be a part of this college. Satisfied with the placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is very available everywhere. Classrooms are spacious and e -classrooms are developed. The library is spacious and a digital library is also available. The canteen is very neat and the quality of food is good. Medical facilities are 24/7 available. Sports and games are conducted every semester.

highlights.summary:
The OJEE 2026 registration process has begun for Gandhi Institute of Excellent Technocrats admission to BTech, BPharma, MBA, and MCA programmes. The final date to register is Mar 22, 2026. Additionally, the exam dates are tentatively scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, and from May 7 to May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer:
A:    Gandhi Institute of Excellent Technocrats has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed 10+2 examination with Physics, Mathematics and Chemistry and obtained at least 45% marks for general (40% marks for in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in the above subjects taken together.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of minimum 3 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category.MCACandidate must have completed BCA/ Bachelor Degree in Computer Science Engineering or equivalent Degree with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
OR
Candidate who have completed B.Sc./ B.Com./ B.A. with Mathematics at 10+2 Level or at Graduation Level can also apply.
45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category.After 10th DiplomaCandidate passed 10th class/equivalent conducted by BSE, Odisha/equivalent are eligible to apply.
The lower age limit is 14 years and there is no upper age limit.

overview_faqs.question: Is Gandhi Institute of Excellent Technocrats a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Gandhi Institute of Excellent Technocrats is a well-known institution for B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA, After 1th Diploma courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Gandhi Institute of Excellent Technocrats has a rating of 3.9 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.9 on campuslife, 3.3 on placements, 4.6 on faculty and 3.8 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Gandhi Institute of Excellent Technocrats Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best college in budget for technical course.

content.Placements: 70 to 90 percent of students are placed in different companies, and the Mahindra campus drives are ongoing. In previous years, the highest placement package was approximately 33 LPA, and the lowest was 7 to 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, Accenture, Tata, Tech Mahindra, Birla, Infosys, etc. Our college provides internships in the 3rd year of the course.
content.Infrastructure: Yes, they have facilities and infrastructure available for departments, such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library, etc. There are many quality facilities in my hostel. The quality of the food is okay; there is a mess. There are sports and games, medical facilities, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Giet, Ghangapatana, Bhubaneswar.

content.Placements: An average of 70–80% got placed, and the highest package is 12 lpa, and the average package is 3.5 lpa. Mahindra, Biotique, krazytech and many other startup companies are visiting our campus. Students were placed in the positions of project manager, software developer, and data engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The classroom is quite good. 50–55 students are present per class. The canteen's food is quite abundant. They give you dahi pakhala in the summer. 24/7 medical facilities will be provided. The campus and hostels are nearby and clean. They conduct annual sports like cricket, volleyball, badminton, chess, running, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My 4-year journey at GIET Ganghapatna College.

content.Placements: As a first-year student, I am not yet familiar with the detailed placement and internship information for my course. However, I have noticed that my seniors have secured good placements here at GIET Ganghapatna, with some of them receiving offers up to 7 LPA. I look forward to gaining more insights and exploring these opportunities in the later years of my studies.
content.Infrastructure: For the course at GIET Ganghapatna, we have good Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a comfortable library. In the hostel, basic amenities are available, including a study table, a chair, and a bed. There is also Wi-Fi, average mess food, and facilities for medical assistance and sports activities.

paragraphs: Gandhi Institute of Excellent Technocrats admissions are entrance-based. The institute accepts scores in JEE Main, CUET-PG, and Odisha CHSE, etc.Gandhi Institute of Excellent Technocratsoffers courses at UG level in Engineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software stream. The institute offers B.E. / B.Tech for 4 years in various specialisations. Candidates can fill out the application form online for admission.

The total tuition fees for UG course isINR 2,48,000. Aspirants have to pay the programme fees at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the institute. The total fees may also include other components such as caution deposit, hostel fees, etc.

In the hostel, basic amenities are available, including a study table, a chair, and a bed. There is also Wi-Fi, average mess food, and facilities for medical assistance and sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all the facilities. The hostel has good environment. The course fee is low. Our college provides many courses like CSE, ECE, EE, mechanical, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has 6 floors. It has 20 classrooms, a laboratory, a HOD room, and a department chamber.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The hostel has 2 buildings. They provide separate hostels for seniors and juniors. The bus facility is available in our college. The Wi-Fi facility is not good. Classrooms are well-furnished. The mess facility is available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Gandhi Institute of Excellent Technocrats.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Hostel is great. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The food quality is decent. Canteen is also available and they provide food 8 times a day. Non-vegetarian food items are also provided once a week.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, libraries, etc. The food served in the mess is average. The mess provides food three times. The campus has a boys' hostel. It has a general store. The infrastructure of our college is developing.

reviews.review_heading: Our institute is very good in terms of education.
reviews.review_text: The food served in our college is good. All classrooms are normal. Wi-Fi is available in our college. A television is available in the canteen. Our college provides a 24X7 water facility every day. All labs are improving much faster. Our college provides all the needed facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities like medical facilities, transport facilities, sports, programmers training, a huge seminar hall, music lab, robot lab, and many labs. The food served in the mess is good. Our college provides a separate building for seniors and juniors. The central library is available in our college. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled.

reviews.review_heading: This college is excellent, and students can level up themselves in this college.
reviews.review_text: It provides free Wi-Fi in both college and hostel. It also provides doubt clearing classes in the evening and online classes. Quality and quantity of food are also good. It also provides a cafe on campus. It provides a reading room, library, and high-quality laboratory for students. It provides the most friendly classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good education at reasonable fees but lacks in extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good professors in all departments, especially the best ones in the mechanical department. We have sufficient books in our library, and we also have an e-library. Our hostel has Wi-Fi connection. Food quality is average. Medical facilities are not up to the mark. There is very less scope for sports.

reviews.review_heading: I am very disappointed with the college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are not very good. The labs are small, and the library and classrooms are not well-maintained. In the hostel, Wi-Fi is provided, but it is password-protected, and no one can access it. The hostel food was good, but the sports facilities were bad.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good campus. Teachers are highly qualified and experienced.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure. Food in the hostel is hygienic. The campus is lush green, and Wi-Fi is available for 24x7. There is a library with a lot of books, a magazine, and an e-library is also available. Indoor and outdoor games are also available, and medical facilities are available for 24x7. Overall, it is an excellent campus with regular classes, well-experienced faculty members, doubts clearing classes, practical sessions, seminars, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good environment for studies as it is at a distance of 5 km from the marketplace.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is huge. Our college offers 6 courses of study and also have different departments. There is a Wi-Fi with 10 Mbps speed. There are different laboratories, and there are also dedicated classrooms for each department and batch. The college has a library and E-library.
